title: valeriana capitata subsp. californica
intro: Valeriana capitata subsp. californica, also known as California valerian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, anxiolytic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of California valerian include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress levels, and relief from muscle and joint pain. California valerian is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
